facts: There are almost 5 million dog bites per year; children are the main victims. Dog bites cause losses of over $1 billion a year.
The average dog can smell up to 100 times better than a human.
A dog's nose is wet because it helps to clean their face.
Obesity is the #1 health problem among dogs.
A dog's sense of smell is so powerful that they can detect changes in a person's emotional state.
